title: Cycy Loctob
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cycy Loctob''' was a non-[[Human/Legends|Human]] resident of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. Cycy made a living by selling contraband.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''

*<!-- 2000-10-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''
